text: I feel both curious and slightly detached in this environment—a modern, glass-encased space where minds gather to collaborate, visible through transparent barriers. There's an energy of collective focus and intention, yet I linger at the periphery, only half-invited to the pulse of activity. The second scene, awash in vibrant colors and bold concepts of "R+D,” invites deeper thought about progress and the interplay of human effort with intelligent machines. I am drawn to reflect on the nature of human inquiry—always reaching, always questioning, and, paradoxically, often just outside the center, contemplating from the edge.
